body.title: Dashboard Section 3 shows cc_queue in_progress ticket
body.result: CC implemented _get_active_cc_ticket() in terminal.py reading cc_channel/queue.json; shows in Section 3
body.description: terminal.py render() currently shows job_manager job_list in Section 3. Add cc_queue in_progress ticket query and display it as 'active: T-xxx — title' above or replacing stale job entries. Query: cc_queue.py list filtered to in_progress. Pass result to render() alongside job_list. LOW inertia (dashboard/terminal.py only).
